title: bidens rubifolia var. coreopsidis
intro: Bidens rubifolia var. coreopsidis, also known as Fireweed Beggarticks, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which help to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and infections. The plant is rich in vitamins, minerals, and antioxidants, providing various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting immune function. Bidens rubifolia var. coreopsidis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
